steps.title: Use the requested similarity
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how Bangkok and Chiang Mai are similar. The notes say that in both cities, thousands gather for the city's largest water fight during Songkran.

steps.title: Reject contrast or broad focus
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes different locations for the water fights. Choice C says the cities do not celebrate in exactly the same way, so it weakens the similarity. Choice D describes Thailand in general instead of comparing the two cities. The answer is B.
